summary: Comprehensive testing of MWA Industries website completed. Backend APIs working well with 90.9% success rate. Frontend UI fully functional with all navigation, forms, and integrations working properly. Both contact and RFQ forms successfully submit to backend and display in admin dashboard.

minor_issues.issue: Status Check POST endpoint returns 422 due to JSON decode error
minor_issues.impact: Status check creation fails, but this is a non-critical feature

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about span elements in select/option tags
console_warnings.impact: Cosmetic console warnings, functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Contact form submission with all fields
Contact form validation (422 for missing fields)
RFQ form submission with all fields
RFQ form validation (422 for missing fields)
Admin endpoints - Get contacts and RFQs (200 OK)
Home page loads with hero section and stats counter
Navigation works for all pages (Home, About, Services, Industries, Projects, Quality, Blog, Contact)
Request Quote button navigation works across pages
Contact form UI submission and success page display
RFQ form UI submission and success page display
Projects page filter functionality (All, Structures filters tested)
Admin dashboard displays form submissions correctly
Sticky WhatsApp and Call buttons visible on desktop
Blog page navigation and filter functionality
